name: Caviar Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 10-inch spring-form pan with a small amount of mayonnaise.
2. Mash the hard-boiled eggs, mayonnaise (just enough to hold the mixture together), salt, and pepper until combined.
3. Spread the mashed egg mixture into the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Scatter scallions on top of the egg salad.
5. Mix cream cheese and sour cream until smooth.
6. Spread the blended cream cheese over the scallions.
7. The recipe can be prepared up to this point ahead of time (up to 24 hours is recommended). Place the spring-form pan on a paper towel-lined plate, as the sour cream may separate.
8. Use wax paper to create an aesthetic design and toothpicks to arrange the caviar.
9. Serve with plain crackers such as Carr's Table Water Biscuits.
